title: Pseudopodospermum libanoticum
taxonomy: Pseudopodospermum libanoticum is a species in the family Celastraceae. It is classified under the kingdom Plantae and is a type of flowering plant. The plant is further classified into the order Celastrales, and then into the class Magnoliopsida. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and morphological features. Pseudopodospermum libanoticum's classification is also reflected in its botanical name, which follows the binomial nomenclature system.
